title: syringa komarowii subsp. reflexa
intro: Syringa komarowii subsp. reflexa is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Adoxaceae, commonly known as the Chinese lilac or Korean lilac. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Syringa komarowii subsp. reflexa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
